title: gasSolidSplitter operation
description: Ideal, specification-driven gas-solid separator -- the simple sibling of the cyclone / bag filter.  You SET the split (no efficiency physics, no size classification); the feed PSD passes through unchanged.  Use it when a physics model is overkill, as a placeholder, or to bound a design.

solidsRecovery.title: Solids recovery
solidsRecovery.description: Fraction of the solid mass sent to capturedSolids (default 1.0 = perfect separation).

gasCarryover.title: Gas carryover
gasCarryover.description: Fraction of the gas leaving WITH the solids outlet (default 0.0 = no gas in the solids stream).
